description_long: This is a bolt-action rifle with a classic wooden stock and a long, slender barrel, reminiscent of mid-20th-century military firearms such as the Karabiner 98k. The stock is made of a light brown wood, extending from the butt to the fore-end, with a slight curve for ergonomic shoulder placement. The barrel and receiver are constructed from dark metal, with visible iron sights mounted along the top. The trigger guard and magazine area are also metallic, and the rifle features a bolt handle on the right side. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal embellishments, focusing on durability and reliability for field use.
description: A classic bolt-action rifle with a wooden stock and long metal barrel, featuring iron sights and a utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, highlighting the wooden stock, long barrel, and iron sights.
description_view_1: Front-on view emphasizing the narrow profile of the barrel and the alignment of the iron sights.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock, metal receiver, and the bolt handle protruding from the right.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the butt of the stock and the straight alignment of the barrel.
